payload.label: bed
payload.short_description: dark wood bed with striped bedding
payload.long_description: Dark mahogany wooden bed with tall paneled headboard and a light beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet with two matching pillows; left side and lower front of the frame are partially cropped by the image edge, wood appears smooth and polished and the mattress surface is clearly visible (approx. 1.5 m from camera).
